26,1.n: The end of the world was spotted from here and the crew decided to turn SW.

27,8.n: landing, with partial crew venturing across the land for 4 days

28,8.n: A giant pillar (steele) seen from the sea

29,8.n: dungeon 01 - tomb of the piss baby

25,10.n: The nest of a great bird, made from gigantic branches.  Not present. Boast-worthy!

25,11.n:
A rune stone with an inscription:
“Take up your blade and remove 2 crowns in 1 strike from a King atop this mound – Our God Knell, our God Knell”

28,13.n: Campaign starting location.  A storm thrusts us north.

R2.name: Room R2
R2.n: Part of a worm slithering in a track through various rooms.

R4.name: Room R4
R4.n: Undead dude strapped to a chair.  He no bueno.  sprints out of dungeon and digs himself a hole as soon as he's let go.

R6.name: Room R6
R6.n:
remnants of a mural:
“Thou breaker of oaths are condemned to silence and wrestless sleep eternal”

R11.name: Room R11
R11.n: brilliant tree.  combat with the worm. 3 dead. Ulf devoured.

R15.name: Room R15
R15.n: Corpse of the Queen and loot (covered in wax)

R16.name: Room R16
R16.n: Wood carving of a battle with a brilliant tree in the background

R18.name: Room R18
R18.n: a body hanging from the ceiling; a knife in one hand, the other outstretched.

R20.name: Room R20
R20.n: secret loot vault revealed after shaking the suspended body's hand.

R21.name: Room R21
R21.n: A series of bodies hung on crosses
